scripts.cap:build: vite build --mode native && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run cap:build && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ~/Downloads/surri-debug-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).apk
scripts.build:aab: npm run cap:build && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && cp app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab ~/Downloads/surri-release-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).aab
